title: Mademoiselle Gobete
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Maurice Hennequin, Pierre Veber
actors: Silvana Pampanini, Carlo Dapporto, Ave Ninchi
plot: A singer and operetta dancer works in a small french town where the authorities want to expel her because of her scandalous conduct and performance. When a puritan judge closes the show, the woman will take revenge involving the j...
